name: surveillance-transparency-navigator
description: Surveillance Transparency Navigator (STN) — Lens of Light. Public-interest transparency & civic intelligence platform.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared --if-present && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.test: npm run test -w shared --if-present && npm run test -w server && npm run test -w web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w web
